atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the `@apply` directive to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: The `@layer` directive tells Tailwind which "bucket" a set of custom styles belong to.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the `@config` directive to specify the configuration file Tailwind should use for that file.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Define a custom variant for Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Define or override theme values for Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Include a plugin for Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Define a custom utility for Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Define a source path for Tailwind CSS v4.
